name: Cranberry, Holiday
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to your desired baking temperature.
2. In a large bowl, combine the water, butter, orange extract, and lemon juice.
3. Sift together the flour, dry milk, sugar, salt, ground cloves, cinnamon, allspice, and yeast (or fast rise yeast).
4. Add the sifted dry ingredients to the wet mixture and mix until well combined.
5. Form the dough into a loaf and place it in a greased baking dish.
6. Bake according to your chosen bake cycle: regular, rapid, or delayed time.
7. Remove from the oven and allow to cool before serving.
